title: Totem Frog
description: This resource pack replaces the regular totem with a frog!
body:
## ****"3D TotemFrog"**** is a resource pack that replaces the immortality totem with a 3D frog

> ###     What does it change?
>
> - Replaces the texture of the immortality totem with a 3D frog model.
> - Changes the sound of the immortality totem to the croaking sound of a frog
> - Supports all versions starting from 1.11

> ###       Important
>
> - This resource pack is not compatible with the [Small Totem Pop](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/small-totem-pop/), [Small Totem Pops](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/small-totem-pops/), [Small Totem Render](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/small-totem-render/), [Small Totem Overlay](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/small-totem-overlay/), [small totem pop1](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/small-totem-pop1) resource pack (model conflict)

> # ****Using totem on version 1.11****
> ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b00b4aded11ea40c3d0dd5c499e26300521d382.png)
> - No small totem pops

> # ****Using totem on version 1.13 - 1.21.7****
> ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/60842ea5891b3350f106d0d4661c1e4717af3821.png)
> - Small totem pops
